title: 396 (B). Ka Nu’ Thungetna Zakik Thei Leng Maw

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka nu damlai nite a nop dan lungngai ing,
Ka lungsim hong vut, hong phawng hilo maw;
Ka
lungsim thanem ciang tua hun phawkkha zel ing,
Ka nu thungetna za kik thei leng
maw

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Zakik thei leng, nu’ awkhum za nuam ing
Keima ading hong thungetsakna
aw,
Tua aw za leng, bangzah in lungdam ding
Ka nu thungetna zakik thei leng
maw

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh ka muan theih na’ng ka nu’n thu hong ngetsak,
Pasian deih bang
ka nuntak theih nading;
Pasian’ itna muangin, van innpi hong zuansak,
Tua lai ah ka nu mu-in
lungdam ning

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka nu’ lungduaina le itna, maitaina in,
Lungnop, tawldam, lametna
hong guan hi;
A sak ngei la awte za ing, ka bilkha in,
Tua la van mite’n zong ngaihsa uh
hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Leitung nasep zo-in nuntak lukhu khuta,
Topa tawh vangam nuam ah tawlnga
hi;
Lungdam ni zingsang ciang amah’n hong dawn dinga,
Tawntung innah ka mangkhawm ding uh
hi.
